# build-a-game-session-tracker-app-where-players-can

> Generated by **VIA** — AI Digital Team Platform

## Task
Build a game session tracker app where players can log their gaming sessions with scores and platforms

## Frontend
Deployed to GitHub Pages automatically via GitHub Actions.

## Backend
Deployed to Render. See `main.py` for API endpoints.

## Run Locally
```bash
# Backend
pip install -r requirements.txt
uvicorn main:app --reload

# Frontend
cd src && npm install && npm run dev
```
